title: Amarite Spark Fix
description: a quick fix to  the recipe for the amarite spark from the "amarite" mod
body:
#

in the 1.0.6 and 1.0.8 versions of Amarite, the recipe for the amarite spark requires the tag "amarite:spark_core", while the actual tag is called "amarite:spark_materials", this datapack fixes the recipe and that issue :3

# ![fixed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a57ee4f7e3bdfd5f9cffe2a19977a92005d9c4e.png) #

Before You Ask

**

Q: Can i use this project in my published modpacks?

**

A: of course, you can do this with any of my projects aslong as the download stays hosted within the modrinth ecosystem :3
